overview: Befikr Co. is a Gen Z streetwear eCommerce website with an anime-inspired money mindset aesthetic — bold neon colors, spacious layouts, glitch animations, and premium streetwear vibes for the culture.
features: Anime-style neon design with lime, cyan, pink, and orange accents
Spacious layouts with 100vh hero sections and generous breathing room
Glitch and glow animations on all interactive elements
Money mindset taglines and premium price displays
Bold Space Grotesk typography with gradient text effects
ProductCard with neon border glow and layered depth on hover
Full Gen Z streetwear eCommerce: Home, Shop, Product, Cart, About, Contact
